title: 📚 Publications
text:

Huang Xie, Khazar Khorrami, Okko Räsänen, Tuomas Virtanen (2025). Text-Based Audio Retrieval by Learning From Similarities Between Audio Captions. IEEE Signal Processing Letters (SPL), vol. 32, pp. 221–225. DOI: 10.1109/LSP.2024.3511414

ICASSP 2022 - 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), pp. 8867–8871. DOI: 10.1109/ICASSP43922.2022.9747336

title: 🕊️ About Me
text:
🎓 Education & Work

🕊️ [2026 – present] Postdoctoral Researcher, University of Helsinki
🐦‍🔥 [2021 – 2025] PhD in Signal Processing and Machine Learning, Tampere University
🦉 [2018 – 2020] MSc in Data Engineering and Machine Learning, Tampere University
🦩 [2010 – 2014] MEng in Software Engineering, University of Science and Technology of China
💻 [2011 – 2018] Ex-Software Engineer in Web Development
🪶 Passionate about bridging AI research and real-world applications



🤝 Academic Services

🎯 Conference Reviewer: ICASSP (2021–26), DCASE (2022–26), IJCNN (2025–27)
📋 Journal Reviewer: TASLP
🌐 Workshop Organizer: DCASE Challenge (2022–26)

title: 👋 Hi, I’m Huang Xie (谢晃)
text:
“Science is an error-correcting process.” — Charles S. Peirce


🎓 About Me
I’m a postdoctoral researcher in the Multimodality Research Group at the University of Helsinki. I earned my PhD in 2026 from the Audio Research Group at Tampere University, where I also completed my MSc in Data Engineering and Machine Learning in 2020. I hold an MEng in Software Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (2014). Prior to my academic career, I spent over seven years in the industry as a full-stack software engineer.

🎭 Multimodal Machine Learning
🎬 Audio & Video Understanding
🤖 Deep Learning
🔍 Self-Supervised Learning
💻 Software Development



📰 News

[2026-03-16] Joined the Multimodality Research Group at University of Helsinki as a postdoctoral researcher.
[2026-02-08] Officially completed my PhD in the Audio Research Group at Tampere University.
